Uses of Class
at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.EquationSystem

  • Packages that use EquationSystem 
    Package Description
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo
    This package contains the classes of the rule based system AntiUnifySystem, the corresponding problem definition AntiUnifyProblem and some standard implementations of a rigidity function (RigidityFncSubsequence, RigidityFncSubstring ).
    at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
    This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.

    • Uses of EquationSystem in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

      Methods in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo that return EquationSystem 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      EquationSystem<AntiUnifyProblem> AntiUnify.getEqOrig()
      Returns the original system of equations.
      EquationSystem<AntiUnifyProblem> AntiUnifySystem.getProblemSet() 
      Constructors in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo with parameters of type EquationSystem 
      Constructor and Description
      AntiUnify(RigidityFnc rigidFnc, EquationSystem<AntiUnifyProblem> eq, DebugLevel debugLevel) 
      AntiUnifySystem(Queue<AntiUnifySystem> eqBranch, RigidityFnc rFnc, EquationSystem<AntiUnifyProblem> problemSet, boolean setUID)
      Most likely you don't need this constructor because the algorithm is encapsulated in the class AntiUnify which is much easier to use.

    • Uses of EquationSystem in at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data
